blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,481 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 48°F.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
